Zellijv0.40
EssentialsSimulatorLayoutsPluginsWorkflows
Menu
EssentialsSimulatorLayoutsPluginsWorkflows
Theme

Your terminal. Finally in control.

Zellij shows you what to press — you just focus on the work. A modern replacement for tmux with layouts, plugins, and no config overhead.

  • On-screen shortcut hints

    Every key combo shown right in the status bar. No more memorizing.

  • KDL layouts

    Human-readable config files instead of cryptic bash scripts.

  • WASM plugins

    Write plugins in any language that compiles to WASM. Python, Ruby, Rust.

Quick Install

$bash <(curl -L https://zellij.dev/launch)
zellij — bash — 120×40
sat@box:~/projects/zellij$ cargo build --release
Compilingzellij-utils v0.40.0
✓Done in 12.3s
0sat@box120×40
NORMALPANETABSESSION
zellij 0.40
No UI hints — memorize or look up
Shortcut guide always visible in status bar
bash-based config (tmux.conf)
Human-readable KDL format
Shell script plugins
WASM plugins in any language
No floating panes
Native floating and stacked panes
Session sharing is manual
True multiplayer with per-user cursors
Link

Essentials Cheatsheet

Essential shortcuts for Zellij 0.40.0 — Updated 2026-05-21

/
CLI
zellij-s<name>

Start Session

Start a new named Zellij session from the command line

CLI
zellijlist-sessions

List Sessions

List all active Zellij sessions

CLI
zellijattach<name>

Attach to Session

Attach to an existing Zellij session by name

SESSION
Ctrl+od

Detach Session

Detach from the current Zellij session

SESSION
Ctrl+ow

Open Session Manager

Open the interactive session manager

SESSION
Ctrl+or

Rename Session

Rename the current session

SESSION
Ctrl+on

Create New Session

Create a new Zellij session

SESSION
Ctrl+ox

Kill Session

Kill the current Zellij session

PANE
Ctrl+pd

Split Pane Horizontally

Split the focused pane horizontally (new pane below)

PANE
Ctrl+pr

Split Pane Vertically

Split the focused pane vertically (new pane to the right)

PANE
Ctrl+parrows

Navigate Panes

Navigate between panes using arrow keys

PANE
Ctrl+px

Close Focused Pane

Close the currently focused pane

PANE
Ctrl+pf

Toggle Fullscreen

Toggle fullscreen mode for the focused pane

PANE
Ctrl+pw

Float Pane

Make the focused pane floating

PANE
Ctrl+pe

Embed Floating Pane

Embed a floating pane back into the tiled layout

PANE
Ctrl+pc

Rename Pane

Rename the focused pane

PANE
Ctrl+ps

Stack Panes

Stack all panes on top of each other

PANE
Ctrl+pTab

Navigate Stacked Panes

Navigate between stacked panes

TAB
Ctrl+tn

Create New Tab

Create a new tab

TAB
Ctrl+tx

Close Tab

Close the current tab

TAB
Ctrl+tarrows

Navigate Tabs

Navigate between tabs using arrow keys

TAB
Ctrl+thCtrl+tl

Navigate Tabs Left/Right

Navigate to the left or right tab

TAB
Ctrl+tr

Rename Tab

Rename the current tab

TAB
Ctrl+tH

Move Tab Left

Move the current tab to the left

TAB
Ctrl+tL

Move Tab Right

Move the current tab to the right

TAB
Ctrl+t1-9

Switch to Tab by Number

Switch to a tab by its number (1-9)

SCROLL
Ctrl+sarrows

Scroll Up

Scroll up in the pane buffer

SCROLL
Ctrl+sarrows

Scroll Down

Scroll down in the pane buffer

SCROLL
Ctrl+sjCtrl+sk

Scroll with j/k

Scroll up or down using vim-style keys

SCROLL
Ctrl+sCtrl+u

Page Up

Scroll up by one page

SCROLL
Ctrl+sCtrl+d

Page Down

Scroll down by one page

SCROLL
Ctrl+se

Enter Copy Mode

Enter copy mode to select and copy text

SCROLL
Ctrl+s/

Search in Buffer

Search for text in the pane buffer

SCROLL
Ctrl+sy

Copy Selection

Copy the selected text to the clipboard

SCROLL
Ctrl+sEsc

Exit Scroll Mode

Exit scroll/copy mode

SCROLL
Ctrl+sEnter

Exit Scroll Mode

Exit scroll/copy mode and return to normal mode

RESIZE
Ctrl+n

Enter Resize Mode

Enter resize mode to adjust pane sizes

RESIZE
Ctrl+narrows

Resize Pane Up

Increase the pane size upward

RESIZE
Ctrl+narrows

Resize Pane Down

Increase the pane size downward

RESIZE
Ctrl+n+

Increase Pane Size

Increase the size of the focused pane

RESIZE
Ctrl+n-

Decrease Pane Size

Decrease the size of the focused pane

RESIZE
Ctrl+nEsc

Exit Resize Mode

Exit resize mode and return to normal mode

LOCKED
Ctrl+g

Enter Locked Mode

Lock Zellij, disabling all shortcuts until unlocked

SEARCH
/

Find in Pane

Search for text in the current pane

SEARCH
n

Find Next

Jump to the next search match

SEARCH
N

Find Previous

Jump to the previous search match

NORMAL
Ctrl+p

Enter Pane Mode

Enter pane mode for pane management

NORMAL
Ctrl+t

Enter Tab Mode

Enter tab mode for tab management

NORMAL
Ctrl+s

Enter Scroll Mode

Enter scroll mode to navigate pane history

NORMAL
Ctrl+n

Enter Resize Mode

Enter resize mode for adjusting pane sizes

NORMAL
Ctrl+o

Enter Session Mode

Enter session mode for session management

Interactive Simulator

A browser-based Zellij environment. No installation needed. Press real shortcuts and see what happens.

zellij — main — 120×40
Terminal 1
user@host:~$
user@host:~$
▋
┌┐└┘
NORMALmain
Ctrlp PaneCtrlt TabCtrls ScrollCtrlo SessionCtrln Resize

Select a mission above to get started, or try Free mode to explore.

Esc to return to Normal mode at any time

Layout Editor

Design and preview your Zellij layouts with the KDL editor. Write layout configurations, see them visualized, and download or launch them instantly.

KDL Editor
Loading editor...
Visual Preview
Layout Preview

Layout Templates

Choose from pre-built layouts or customize your own

Minimal

Single pane, no splits - perfect for focused work

minimalsinglefocus
layout {
  pane size=1 {
  }
}

Vertical Split

Two panes side by side for comparing files

splitverticaltwo-panes
layout {
  split direction="vertical" {
    pane
    pane
...

Full-Stack Dev

Three panes: editor, server logs, and git status

developmentfull-stacklogs
layout {
  split direction="vertical" {
    split direction="horizontal" {
      pane
...

Git Workflow

Two tabs for coding and git operations

gitversion-controltabs
layout {
  tab "Coding" {
    pane
  }
...

Log Monitor

Four panes with tail -f commands for monitoring

logsmonitoringfour-panes
layout {
  split direction="horizontal" {
    split direction="vertical" {
      pane command="tail -f logs/app.log"
...

Pair Programming

Two tabs for collaborative sessions

collaborationpairtabs
layout {
  tab "Driver" {
    pane
  }
...

CI/CD Dashboard

Panes with watch commands for pipeline monitoring

ci-cdmonitoringpipeline
layout {
  split direction="horizontal" {
    pane command="watch -n 5 kubectl get pods"
    pane command="watch -n 10 curl -s http://localhost:8080/health"
...

SSH Multi-Server

SSH to multiple hosts in a tiled layout

sshremotemulti-server
layout {
  split direction="horizontal" {
    pane command="ssh server1"
    pane command="ssh server2"
...
Link

Plugin Gallery

Extend Zellij with community plugins. Find tools for status bars, file management, git integration, and more.

Showing 10 of 10 plugins

zellij-statusbar

@NightBorn
342

Configurable status bar with system info, CPU, memory, and network metrics

Status barRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/NightBorn/zellij-statusbar

zjstatus

@Dirb'ed
518

Highly customizable status bar plugin with Cava audio visualization support

Status barRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/dircored/zjstatus

zellij-tab-name-reloader

@_forhacker
89

Auto-names tabs based on the running process or current directory

ProductivityRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/_forhacker/zellij-tab-name-reloader

room

@zellij-org
1,204

Multiplayer session coordinator for collaborative terminal sessions

Session toolsRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/zellij-org/room

zellij-forgot

@NightBorn
156

Remembers and restores your custom keybind configurations across sessions

ProductivityRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/NightBorn/zellij-forgot

lazygit-zellij

@lahwaacz
267

Floating lazygit pane with git status, staging, and commit workflow

Git integrationTypeScript
zellij plugin run https://github.com/lahwaacz/lazygit-zellij

monocle

@hultan88
445

Fuzzy file finder panel for quick navigation across your project

File managementRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/hultan88/monocle

harpoon

@samirmen
198

Jump-list for panes and tabs with quick navigation marks

ProductivityRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/samirmen/harpoon

zellij-floats

@koziev
312

Manage floating panes with tilable layout and focus tracking

Session toolsRust
zellij plugin run https://github.com/koziev/zellij-floats

zellij-neorg

@nvzone
87

Neorg integration for project management and note-taking in Zellij

ProductivityTypeScript
zellij plugin run https://github.com/nvzone/zellij-neorg

Hooks Reference

Event hooks let plugins react to terminal and session changes.

HookFires when...Common use case
renderPlugin needs to re-render its UIUpdate the visual display of your plugin, draw UI elements, refresh themed components
updatePlugin receives a new eventHandle incoming events, process user interactions, update plugin state
on_keyUser presses a key while plugin is focusedCapture keyboard input, implement custom keybindings, build keyboard-driven UIs
tab_updateAny tab changes (new, rename, close)Track tab changes, auto-name tabs based on content, synchronize across tabs
pane_updateAny pane changesMonitor pane creation/destruction, adjust plugin behavior per pane state
mode_updateThe terminal mode changesRespond to mode switches (normal, pane, tab, etc.), enable/disable features per mode
session_updateA session is created, renamed, or destroyedTrack session lifecycle, persist/restore state across sessions, coordinate multi-session
pipe_messageAnother plugin sends a message to this oneInter-plugin communication, build plugin ecosystems, share state between plugins
web_request_resultA pending HTTP request resolvesHandle async API responses, process webhooks, build HTTP-dependent plugins
file_system_updateA watched file or directory changesLive reload configurations, watch for git changes, monitor project files

Plugin Primer

Learn how Zellij plugins work under the hood.

1WASM/WASI Basics

Zellij plugins are compiled to WebAssembly (WASM) and run in a sandboxed environment with no direct access to the host system.

  • Plugins communicate via message passing - no shared memory
  • Any language that compiles to WASM can build Zellij plugins (Rust, Go, TypeScript via AssemblyScript, C, etc.)
  • Plugins run in a WASI (WebAssembly System Interface) environment for file/network access
  • Plugin execution is deterministic and crash-isolated

2Plugin Anatomy

Every Zellij plugin has a minimum structure:

// manifest.kdl (plugin configuration)
plugin {
    version "1.0.0"
    author "Your Name"
    description "Your plugin description"
}

// main.rs (plugin logic)
use zellij_plugin::prelude::*;

struct MyPlugin;

impl Plugin for MyPlugin {
    fn render(&mut self, _rows: usize, _cols: usize) -> String {
        // Return UI as String (renderable text/ANSI)
        "Hello from my plugin!".to_string()
    }

    fn update(&mut self, event: Event) -> bool {
        // Return true to re-render after handling event
        false
    }
}

register!(MyPlugin);

The three essential pieces:

  • render - Returns the UI string to display
  • update - Handles events and returns whether to re-render
  • manifest KDL block - Plugin metadata and permissions

3Permissions System

Plugins must request specific permissions in their manifest:

ReadApplicationStateRead tab/pane/session state
ChangeApplicationStateModify tabs, panes, mode
OpenFilesRead files from filesystem
RunCommandsExecute shell commands
OpenTerminalsOrPluginsSpawn new terminals/plugins
WriteToStdinSend input to panes
WebAccessMake HTTP requests
ReadSecretRead from secrets store
WriteSecretWrite to secrets store

Users approve permissions when installing a plugin. Permissions are visible in the plugin manager.

4Plugin Manager

Since Zellij v0.38, a built-in plugin manager handles installation and updates without manual config editing.

# Install a plugin directly
zellij plugin run https://github.com/author/plugin-name

# Or add to zellij.kdl configuration
plugins {
    my-plugin path:./plugins/my-plugin.wasm
}

# Update all plugins
zellij plugin update --all

# List installed plugins
zellij plugin list

The plugin manager also provides a UI accessible via Ctrl+o → P for browsing and managing plugins.

Link

Advanced Workflows

Step-by-step guides for complex Zellij workflows. Click 'Start' on any workflow to begin the interactive tutorial.

Beginner

Session Resurrection

Restore your workspace exactly as you left it after a reboot or disconnect.

Intermediate

tmux Migration Guide

Transition from tmux prefix-based commands to Zellij mode-based workflows.

Advanced

SSH Multi-Server Workflow

Manage multiple remote servers simultaneously with one Zellij session.

Intermediate

Multiplayer / Collaboration

Share your Zellij session with teammates for real-time collaboration.

Intermediate

CI/CD Startup Layout

Automate project environment setup with a commit-ready layout file.

Intermediate

Keybinding Conflict Resolution

Resolve conflicts between Zellij and tools like Vim that want the same keys.

Beginner

Floating Panes as Quick Terminals

Use floating panes as persistent scratch terminals accessible from any tab.

Advanced

Plugin-Powered Workflow

Install and configure plugins for a turbocharged terminal workflow.

New to Zellij? Start with Essentials or Modes Overview.
